36-40. Effects of the 5 from Karakāńś. If Rahu and Mangal are in the 5
from Karakāńś, one will suffer from a pulmonary consumption, more so, if
th
Candr gives them a Drishti. The Drishti of Mangal on the 5 from Karakāńś
th
will bring boils, or ulcers, Ketu‟s Drishti on the 5 from Karakāńś will cause
dysentery and other diseases, caused by (impure) water. If Rahu and Gulik
th
happen to be in the 5 from Karakāńś, there will be fear from mean people
th
and poison. Should Budh be in the 5 from Karakāńś, the native will be an
th
ascetic of the highest order, or one, holding staff. Sūrya in the 5 from
